hypothesis: On US500 M15, trend-pullback longs to EMA(20) inside a bullish EMA(20)>EMA(50) stack during US session deliver >2R when RSI(14) dips to 40-50 then turns up, gated by ADX(14)>18.

signal.entry_long: ema(20) > ema(50) AND low <= ema(20) AND rsi(14) crossed_up 50 from below AND rsi(14) > 40
signal.entry_short: ema(20) < ema(50) AND high >= ema(20) AND rsi(14) crossed_down 50 from above AND rsi(14) < 60

regime_filter.rule: adx(14) > 18 AND atr_percentile(14, lookback=200) BETWEEN 0.25 AND 0.90

notes: Classic EMA pullback on US500 during NY session; avoids Asia/early-London thin liquidity.
